steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is the object of the opening participial phrase "Assembling ______". That phrase must refer to the thing the artist assembles — her collage-based paintings (plural). The pronoun needs to match the number and referent of "paintings."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘it’: singular, but "paintings" is plural. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘that’: a relative pronoun, not a standalone object pronoun; no clear antecedent in this position. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘her’: refers to the artist herself, making the artist the object of her own assembling — illogical. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘them’: plural object pronoun correctly referring to "her massive collage-based paintings." ✓
That confirms D is correct.
